74775.subject: AI has granted America vast new power
74775.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MTF9AAcAAAAAAuDmXdlMkmN33f9mgRE3nLGDe8QBivJUn9vsUKLv1fwRKehiSut90KOAmtc6rnBEy_XMjGl1osl7C4oc9JifZiKgTXn7qs2qE_9eKBXIZw 

June 18th 2026

 

 
 
 
The Economist This Week

 Highlights from the latest issue


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MTF9AAcAAAAAAuDmXdlN5bXXSTspBvUQHP7FDpqf2dNFfKWPKUiX74_G45piBvxkT9c-3BBSliIaXqNyGvkVJmUQJJHUpge4A3ZsqaW6W7PsgtEv2vXQqQ 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MTF9AAcAAAAAAuDmXdlOqfSrq6UCRYwOCHFbyAb-RcN7yChU5Aw67pNYE4DWbOoANOVHsbq4HcYUEfNbkUTwIrFay4FbdOcuPrlvjO1eG5mXnq8rp2Wq8A 



https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MTF9AAcAAAAAAuDmXdlPgnjCwuKSLsbkwI4UYJJZYHAWYFFpeWdqfO1GAbTWVtk4KT0naCnSldCMQmPdr2AULjkQ0R2fbmUCVsaI41LxdBTvCCbS 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MTF9AAcAAAAAAuDmXdlQz-glmKTmZ_vvLu4DNVOa6xFpGvS6uq16dGAf-XR0i-JFh-vo3UifCm7jv8cG-SevDqAcGDGeNcJwSYR1zphYnEeSDcnE 



Robert Guest

Deputy editor



 My former neighbour, a delightful, fiercely independent lady who died in her mid-nineties, often told me she hated computers. She didn’t own one, didn’t want one and bristled when her bank suggested she switch to an online account on the smartphone she didn’t have. It would have been pointless to argue that banking apps are actually quite convenient. She didn’t want to change.


 Both our cover stories thi

74773.subject: That’s Week One – Wrapped ⚽
74773.body:
A THRILLING START!

GOALS AND DRAMA AS FANS SOAK UP THE EXCITEMENT

The story of the FIFA World Cup 2026™ has already produced some unforgettable
moments.

Are you ready for the next chapter as football’s biggest names look to take
another step towards the knockout phase?

Get closer to the game you love with exclusive FIFA Rewards, buy official World
Cup merchandise, and rise to the challenge with games galore in the Play Zone.

QUIZ: HOW CLOSELY WERE YOU WATCHING?

We’ve seen great goals and tremendous goals, but were you paying attention?
Test yourself with our opening round quiz!

[Test your knowledge]
https://www.fifa.com/en/tournaments/mens/worldcup/canadamexicousa2026/articles/opening-round-quiz-questions-tournament?cid=(p_email)(c_fwc)(sc_fwc26-general)(ssc_fwc-2026)(l_en)(da_180626)(id_fwc26-group-stage-match-2-en-180626-email-final)(cc_fwc26)

HIGHLIGHTS: RELIVE EVERY MOMENT

All the goals, all the drama. Get highlights from all 104 matches throughout
the FIFA World Cup 2026 here!

[Watch now]
https://www.fifa.com/tournaments/mens/worldcup/canadamexicousa2026/highlights?cid=(p_email)(c_fwc)(sc_aramco-h-fwc26)(ssc_fwc-2026)(l_en)(da_180626)(id_fwc26-group-stage-match-2-en-180626-email-final)(cc_fwc26)

WHO MAKES YOUR STARTING XI?

A winning team always has a game plan to reach its goals. Discover which Lenovo
Digital Workplace Solutions can help your organization perform at its best.

[Select your squad]
https://lenovosquadselector.campaignhubs.com/

SPEND POINTS, GET REWARDS!

Try on the FIFA World Cup 2026™ Official Mascots, unwrap a digital sticker
pack, exchange for a FIFA Store voucher, score an exclusive stadium tour
discount and more.

[Redeem now]
https://www.fifa.com/en/rewards/marketplace?cid=(p_email)(c_fwc)(sc_rewards-general)(ssc_fwc-2026)(l_en)(da_180626)(id_fwc26-group-stage-match-2-en-180626-email-final)(cc_fwc26)

GROUP STAGE HEATS UP

Gear up with official clothing, headwear and collectibles inspired by the
game's biggest moments.

[Shop now]
https://store.fifa.com/collections/world-cup-2026?utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=WK25_GSMatch2Feature_180626?cid=(p_email)(c_fwc)(sc_store-general)(ssc_fwc-2026)(l_en)(da_180626)(id_fwc26-group-stage-match-2-en-180626-email-final)(cc_fwc26)

PREDICT THE NEXT MATCH

Predict every game and compete with friends and fans globally. Play the
official Match Predictor presented by ADI Predictstreet and climb the
leaderboards.

[Predict now]
https://play.fifa.com/match-predictor/?cid=(p_email)(c_fwc)(sc_adi-predictstreet-mp-fwc26)(ssc_fwc-2026)(l_en)(da_180626)(id_fwc26-group-stage-match-2-en-180626-email-final)(cc_fwc26)

PLAY THE FIFA WORLD CUP 2026™

You’ve seen it live—now experience it your way. Predict results, relive iconic
moments, test your skills and compete with fans worldwide across games built for
the FIFA World Cup 2026™.

[Join the game]
https://play.fifa.com/?cid=(p_email)(c_fwc)(sc_playzon

74772.subject: 🔷 The Daily: 'One of the most anti-crypto laws in the US'
74772.body:
'Bitcoin Rodney' pleads guilty in $1.8 billion crypto fraud case | Ethereum Foundation co-Exec Director and board member Hsiao-Wei Wang steps down | Kraken integrates Solana DEX trading into core app | CME Group sues CFTC over approval of perpetual futures |

The Daily ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by James Hunt | Edited by Jason Shubnell

Presented by

LMAX ( https://www.theblock.co/lmax?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Happy Thursday! *Glassnode* sees signs of onchain stabilization despite *bitcoin* slipping below $63,000 after *Fed* Chair *Kevin Warsh's* hawkish debut, while other analysts ( https://www.theblock.co/post/405213/bitcoin-slips-below-64000-as-hawkish-fed-overshadows-signs-of-onchain-repair?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) remain divided on whether improving liquidity and historically attractive levels outweigh macro headwinds.

In today's newsletter, *Illinois* ' new 0.2% crypto transaction tax sparks an industry backlash, " *Bitcoin Rodney* " pleads guilty in a $1.8 billion crypto fraud case, *Hsiao-Wei Wang* steps down from the *Ethereum Foundation* , and more.

Meanwhile, Naga Avan-Nomayo takes a look ( https://www.theblock.co/post/405248/ethereum-130-million-security-fund-the-dao-hack-10-years?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) at *The DAO* hack at 10: From a $50 million exploit to a $130 million *Ethereum* security fund.

Plus, *Strategy's STRC* preferred stock closed ( https://www.theblock.co/post/405160/strategys-strc-preferred-stock-closes-day-89?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) 11% below par on Wednesday at $89, subsequently falling to a record low under $83 on Thursday.

*P.S.* Don't forget to check out The Funding , a biweekly rundown of crypto VC trends. It's a great read — and just like The Daily , it's free to subscribe ( https://www.theblock.co/newsletters?select=The%20Funding&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) !

*THE BIG ONE*

*😡 'One of the most anti-crypto laws in the US': Illinois Gov. Pritzker signs 0.2% crypto tax*

( https://www.theblock.co/post/405146/one-most-anti-crypto-laws-in-us-illinois-gov-pritzker-signs-0-2-crypto-tax?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

*Illinois* *Gov. JB Pritzker* signed the *Digital Asset Tax Act* into law, imposing a 0.2% tax on crypto transactions involving customers in the state starting Jan. 1, 2027.

* The law requires exchanges, custodians, brokers, and other crypto service providers to collect and remit the tax, similar to a sales tax.
* Crypto

>>>>
>>>> Mate zaujem o showroom v Rozhanovciach? :)

>>>> napísala(a):
>>>>
>>>>> Dobry, ale bohuzial nemozeme zajtra doobedu, cca od  14:00? Alebo
>>>>> pondelok do obedu.
>>>>> Dakujem za pochopenie
>>>>>
>>>>> чт, 18 черв. 2026 р. о 15:51 Posh Posh Weddings <info@poshposh.sk>
>>>>> пише:
>>>>>
>>>>>> Zdravím Oleg,
>>>>>>
>>>>>> Určite áno, mali by ste čas doobedu?
>>>>>>
>>>>>> Ďakujem
>>>>>>
>>>>>> S pozdravom
>>>>>>
>>>>>> Lenka Gattiker
>>>>>>
>>>>>> Dňa št 18. 6. 2026 o 15:33 Oleg Novosadov <novosadovoleg@gmail.com>
>>>>>> napísala(a):
>>>>>>
>>>>>>> Dobry ,
>>>>>>>
>>>>>>> Chcel by som sa spytat ci mate este volny termin na 26.07.2026, a
>>>>>>> ked Ano, ta potom mohli by sme zajtra stretnut?
>>>>>>>
>>>>>>> вт, 19 трав. 2026 р. о 12:09 Posh Posh Weddings <info@poshposh.sk>
>>>>>>> пише:
>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>> Zdravíme nevestu💍🤍,
>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>> Ďakujeme veľmi pekne za vašu správu.. Termín svadby máme ešte voľný
>>>>>>>> a veľmi radi budeme súčasťou vašej svadby.🤍
>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>> Spravidla sa s klientami stretávame osobne v showroome v
>>>>>>>> Rozhanovciach (kúsok od Košíc) kde si spolu vieme vyskladať svadobnú
>>>>>>>> výzdobu a na základe toho vytvoriť cenovú ponuku na mieru pre vás ak by ste
>>>>>>>> mali záujem prosím navrhnite deň a čas kedy by vám to najviac vyhovovalo
>>>>>>>> aby sa časovo radi prispôsobíme vášmu času. Poprípade, ak sme mimo Košíc či
>>>>>>>> Prešova, radi si s Vami dohodneme videohovor. Prosím navrhnite deň a čas,
>>>>>>>> ktorý by Vám vyhovoval najviac, pokojne aj cez víkend aj vo večerných
>>>>>>>> hodinách. 🙂 Najbližsie voľne termíny máme ešte aj tento týždeň. Forme
>>>>>>>> stretnutia sa radi prispôsobíme Vám, čo je pre Vás praktickejšie ☺️
>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>> Budeme sa tešiť na prípadnú spoluprácu s Vami.
>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>> S pozdravom
>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>> Lenka Gattiker,
>>>>>>>> Vaša osobná posh asistentka
>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>>
